<artifact identifier="chao-le-ma-prototype" type="text/html" title="吵了吗 — 关系情绪微记 iOS 原型">
<!doctype html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>吵了吗 — 关系情绪微记 iOS 原型</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg: oklch(98% 0.005 80);
      --surface: oklch(100% 0 0);
      --fg: oklch(24% 0.015 60);
      --muted: oklch(52% 0.012 60);
      --border: oklch(91% 0.008 70);
      
      /* Primary Brand & Status Palette */
      --accent-danger: oklch(62% 0.16 24); /* 软糯红 冲冲突区 */
      --accent-safe: oklch(68% 0.13 142);    /* 晴朗绿 和谐区 */
      --accent-warm: oklch(76% 0.12 75);     /* 治愈橙 缓冲器 */
      --accent-blue: oklch(64% 0.14 230);    /* 冷静蓝 复盘期 */
      
      --font-display: 'Söhne', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "PingFang SC", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif;
      --font-body: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "PingFang SC", sans-serif;
      --font-mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, SF Pro Text, monospace;
    }

    * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body {
      background-color: var(--bg);
      color: var(--fg);
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      padding: 40px 24px;
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
    }

    /* Meta Header */
    .app-header {
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 40px;
      max-width: 600px;
    }
    .app-title {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 2.2rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--fg);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .app-title span.tag {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      background: var(--accent-danger);
      color: white;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-weight: 500;
    }
    .app-subtitle {
      font-size: 1rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-top: 8px;
    }

    /* Workspace / Grid Arrangement */
    .workspace-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 390px);
      gap: 40px;
      justify-content: center;
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 1300px;
    }

    @media (max-width: 1250px) {
      .workspace-grid {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 390px);
      }
    }
    @media (max-width: 840px) {
      .workspace-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        max-width: 390px;
      }
    }

    /* iOS Device Frame Mockup */
    .phone-container {
      background: #111;
      border-radius: 50px;
      padding: 12px;
      box-shadow: 0 25px 60px -15px rgba(0,0,0,0.15), 0 0 0 4px #222;
      width: 390px;
      height: 844px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .screen-canvas {
      background: oklch(99% 0.003 100);
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      border-radius: 40px;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      position: relative;
    }

    /* iOS System Bar Mockups */
    .status-bar {
      height: 47px;
      padding: 0 28px;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      z-index: 10;
      background: transparent;
    }
    .dynamic-island {
      position: absolute;
      top: 11px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 110px;
      height: 30px;
      background: #000;
      border-radius: 20px;
      z-index: 20;
    }
    .status-icons {
      display: flex;
      gap: 5px;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .home-indicator {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 8px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 140px;
      height: 5px;
      background: #222;
      border-radius: 10px;
      z-index: 10;
    }

    /* Screen Context Global elements */
    .screen-content {
      flex: 1;
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 16px 20px 8

content: 我会把它做成 iOS 小程序感的多屏原型：每个主要界面单独成文件，`index.html` 作为预览入口。视觉方向先按情绪记录产品来定：温和但不幼稚，用中性底、青绿色主动作、珊瑚色作为情绪提醒。这个项目里已有几张参考图和一个旧 artifact 记录，没有现成设计系统文件。我先快速看参考资源，避免做出和你已有素材脱节的界面。
